messages.content: 帮我打开这个商品页看看，把商品名称、价格、币种、库存、评分和评论数抓出来：example.com/product/123

browser navigate https://example.com/product/123
browser extract "Extract the product information" '{"productName":"string","price":"number","currency":"string","inStock":"boolean","rating":"number","reviewCount":"number"}'
browser close
帮我去 example.com/contact 把联系表单填了：姓名 John Doe，邮箱 john.doe@example.com，留言写 I would like to inquire about your services。提交后截个图。

browser navigate https://example.com/contact
browser act "Fill in the name field with 'John Doe'"
browser act "Fill in the email field with 'john.doe@example.com'"
browser act "Fill in the message field with 'I would like to inquire about your services'"
browser act "Click the Submit button"
browser screenshot
browser close
去 TechCrunch 看看最新科技新闻，把前 5 条标题、摘要、作者和发布时间抓出来，后面我再自己总结。

browser navigate https://techcrunch.com
browser extract "Extract the top 5 article headlines and their summaries" '{"articles":[{"headline":"string","summary":"string","author":"string","publishedDate":"string"}]}'
browser close
帮我登录 example.com，然后进到我的 dashboard，进去后截个图。

browser navigate https://example.com/login
browser act "Fill in the username field with 'myusername'"
browser act "Fill in the password field with 'mypassword'"
browser act "Click the Login button"
browser act "Wait for the page to fully load"
browser navigate https://example.com/dashboard
browser screenshot
browser close
去 Google 搜一下 best TypeScript practices，把前 5 条结果抓出来。

browser navigate https://www.google.com
browser act "Type 'best TypeScript practices' in the search box and press Enter"
browser act "Wait for search results to load"
browser extract "Extract the top 5 search results" '{"results":[{"title":"string","url":"string","snippet":"string"}]}'
browser close
把这个 PDF 下载下来：example.com/documents/report.pdf

browser navigate https://example.com/documents/report.pdf
browser act "Wait for 5 seconds for the download to complete"
browser close
帮我看看 example.com/form 的提交按钮为什么点不了，先把页面状态和相关证据收集一下。

browser navigate https://example.com/form
browser screenshot
browser observe "Find all buttons and their states"
browser observe "Find all form input fields and their required status"
browser act "Fill in all required fields with test data"
browser screenshot
browser observe "Check if the submit button is now enabled"
browser close
把 example.com/products 前 3 页的商品信息都抓出来。

browser navigate https://example.com/products
browser extract "Extract all products on this page" '{"products":[{"name":"string","price":"number","imageUrl":"string"}]}'
browser act "Click the Next Page button"
browser extract "Extract all products on this page" '{"products":[{"name":"string","price":"number","imageUrl":"string"}]}'
browser act "Click the Next Page button"
browser extract "Extract all products on this page" '{"products":[{"name":"string","price":"number","imageUrl":"string"}]}'
browser close
去 OpenAI 文档里搜 function calling，把前 3 条结果抓出来。

browser navigate https://platform.openai.com/docs
browser act "Type 'function calling' in the documentation search box and press Enter"
browser act "Wait for search results to load"
browser extract "Extract the top 3 search results" '{"results":[{"title":"string","url":"string","snippet":"string"}]}'
browser close
打开 GitHub 上的 openai/openai-python 仓库首页，把仓库名、简介和 star 数抓出来。

browser navigate https://github.com/openai/openai-python
browser extract "Extract the repository name, short description, and star count" '{"repository":"string","description":"string","stars":"string"}'
browser close
打开 Notion 官网的 pricing 页面，帮我截一张图。

browser navigate https://www.notion.so/pricing
browser screenshot
browser close
打开 Hacker News 首页，把前 5 条帖子标题和链接抓出来。

browser navigate https://news.ycombinator.com/
browser extract "Extract the top 5 post titles and URLs from the homepage" '{"posts":[{"title":"string","url":"string"}]}'
browser close
去 example.com/newsletter，用 alice@example.com 帮我订阅一下邮件列表，提交后截个图。

browser navigate https://example.com/newsletter
browser act "Fill in the email field with 'alice@example.com'"
browser act "Click the Subscribe button"
browser screenshot
browser close
去 YouTube 搜一下 LoRA fine tuning tutorial，把前 5 个视频标题和频道名抓出来。

browser navigate https://www.youtube.com/
browser act "Type 'LoRA fine tuning tutorial' in the search box and press Enter"
browser act "Wait for search results to load"
browser extract "Extract the top 5 video titles and their channel names" '{"videos":[{"title":"string","channel":"string"}]}'
browser close
帮我看下 example.com/login 的登录按钮为什么点不了，先检查按钮状态和输入框情况。

browser navigate https://example.com/login
browser screenshot
browser observe "Find the login button and report whether it is enabled or disabled"
browser observe "Find the username and password input fields and whether they are required"
browser close
把 example.com/jobs 前 2 页的职位名称和工作地点抓出来。

browser navigate https://example.com/jobs
browser extract "Extract all job titles and locations on this page" '{"jobs":[{"jobTitle":"string","location":"string"}]}'
browser act "Click the Next Page button"
browser extract "Extract all job titles and locations on this page" '{"jobs":[{"jobTitle":"string","location":"string"}]}'
browser close
打开 docs.python.org 首页，看看顶部导航都有哪些菜单项，再确认页面上有没有登录按钮。

browser navigate https://docs.python.org/3/
browser observe "List the top navigation menu items"
browser observe "Check whether there is a visible login button on the page"
browser close
在 Google 里搜一下 Seattle weather this weekend，把前 3 条结果抓出来。

browser navigate https://www.google.com
browser act "Type 'Seattle weather this weekend' in the search box and press Enter"
browser act "Wait for search results to load"
browser extract "Extract the top 3 search results" '{"results":[{"title":"string","url":"string","snippet":"string"}]}'
browser close
打开 example.com/product/456，把商品名称、价格和库存状态抓出来。

browser navigate https://example.com/product/456
browser extract "Extract the product name, price, and stock status" '{"productName":"string","price":"number","inStock":"boolean"}'
browser close
把这个 CSV 文件下载下来：example.com/files/users.csv

browser navigate https://example.com/files/users.csv
browser act "Wait for 5 seconds for the download to complete"
browser close
去 example.com/feedback 帮我填一下反馈表单：姓名 Bob Lee，邮箱 bob@example.com，内容写 The checkout page is confusing。

browser navigate https://example.com/feedback
browser act "Fill in the name field with 'Bob Lee'"
browser act "Fill in the email field with 'bob@example.com'"
browser act "Fill in the message field with 'The checkout page is confusing'"
browser act "Click the Submit button"
browser screenshot
browser close
打开 Google，搜一下 browser automation stagehand github，点开第一条结果，然后把页面标题和前两段简介抓出来。

browser navigate https://www.google.com
browser act "Type 'browser automation stagehand github' in the search box and press Enter"
browser act "Wait for search results to load"
browser act "Click the first search result"
browser act "Wait for the page to fully load"
browser extract "Extract the page title and the first two introductory paragraphs" '{"pageTitle":"string","introParagraph1":"string","introParagraph2":"string"}'
browser close
打开 example.com/feedback，把反馈表单填了：Alice Chen / liam.zhang@example.net / The checkout page is confusing。

browser navigate https://example.com/feedback
browser act "Fill in the name field with 'Alice Chen'"
browser act "Fill in the email field with 'liam.zhang@example.net'"
browser act "Fill in the message field with 'The checkout page is confusing'"
browser act "Click the Submit button"
browser close
帮我登录 portal.example.org，用户名 myusername，密码 Passw0rd!，然后进入 dashboard。 进去后截个图。

browser navigate https://portal.example.org/sign-in
browser act "Fill in the username field with 'myusername'"
browser act "Fill in the password field with 'Passw0rd!'"
browser act "Click the Login button"
browser act "Wait for the page to fully load"
browser navigate https://portal.example.org/dashboard
browser screenshot
browser close
去 OpenAI Docs 里搜 function calling，把前 3 条结果抓出来。

browser navigate https://platform.openai.com/docs
browser act "Type 'function calling' in the documentation search box and press Enter"
browser act "Wait for search results to load"
browser extract "Extract the top 3 search results" '{"results":[{"title":"string","url":"string","snippet":"string"}]}'
browser close
